# Stacking Rules

Promotional codes have specific stacking rules: they cannot be combined with one another, and a percentage-off code may not be used alongside loyalty point redemption within the same order. However, customers can combine a free-shipping code with a single percentage-off code since these discounts affect different parts of the total order amount.

[Source: promo_codes.md#stacking-rules]
